segments.text: 計利以聽，乃為之勢，以佐其外。勢者，因利而制權也。

draftRationale.segmentation: Combined two short sentences into one segment. Both sentences are brief (23 and 12 characters respectively) and thematically connected—the second sentence defines 勢 (shi) introduced in the first. They read as a unified passage and splitting would fragment the conceptual unity.
